entry.title: Welcome to my blog
entry.content:
This is Sijianf, and I am happy to meet you here.

Studying in Emory now, I would like to share my opinions to people and also get your views about this world. I am not a typical coder, most of my work will be linked to SAS, R, or Python. It doesn’t matter, though.

Still, Hi, everyone!
